alkylation reagent: followed by 10 mM iodoacetamide in the dark at room temperature for 45 min
cleavage agent: Proteins were digested with trypsin (50:1; w/vol)
instrument: coupled to high resolution, high mass accuracy mass spectrometry (Fusion Lumos, Thermo Scientific)
labeling: Due to the minimal sample size, label-free, relative quantification was calculated
reduction reagent: incubated with 5 mM dithiothreitol for 1 h at 56 °C
